docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIEVE, HERMAN FRANKLIN, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT JUBB, ADRIAN DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-25-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-10-2005
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIEVE, HERMAN FRANKLIN, CARL SERVED JAN-09-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JUBB, ADRIAN
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JUBB, ADRIAN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIEVE, HERMAN FRANKLIN, CARL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-23-2005. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-27-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAR-25-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-02-2005.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BRIAN TIMOTHY MURPHY.
DEFENDANT(S)-A. JUBB REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT BRUCE INGRAM.
ARBITRATOR MICHAEL EDWARD DELEHUNT APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-03-2005 THROUGH SEP-01-2005.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2005 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT CCP 664.6 -ENTIRE ACTION, FILED BY NIEVE, HERMAN FRANKLIN, CARL JUBB, ADRIAN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-27-2005 - NO APPEARANCE. CASE IS DISMISSED.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-03-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
